name: Call-Of-Doodie
currentFocus: Execution-quality refinement remains the core track, but the repo is now back to a clean baseline: lint/test/build all pass while architecture split, front-door simplification, leaderboard trust v2, and post-run coaching v2 remain the next product moves.
nextMilestone: Complete the first real App-domain extraction and front-door simplification pass while preserving the current deployable build, with leaderboard trust/readability queued immediately after.
